dataset_name: Accident and Emergency Attendances and Emergency Admissions
publication_date_hint: Publication dates appear in page metadata and monthly release pages. Files follow pattern 'Monthly-AE-[Month]-[Year].csv'.
subject_period_hint: Subject period is monthly, extracted from filenames and release dates. Files cover May 2024 onwards with monthly granularity.
subpage_link_hint: Sub-pages are organized by fiscal year (e.g., 2026-27, 2025-26) following pattern .../ae-attendances-and-emergency-admissions-YYYY-YY/

targets.notes: Monthly CSV files. Subject period inferred from filename pattern 'Monthly-AE-[Month]-[Year].csv'. Fiscal year organized pages.
